name: stm32f103rct6_hybrid
description: Hybrid pack: Zephyr RTOS + AEL bare-metal on STM32F103RCT6 in one run. Proves Zephyr OS tests and bare-metal mailbox tests can co-exist on the same board — each test re-flashes the board, alternating between Zephyr and bare-metal firmware. No jumper changes needed between tests.
